did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.physdesc: Meeting minutes, membership lists, and newspaper clippings.
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Includes meeting minutes, membership lists, and newspaper clippings.

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Established in 1937, Ceres Circle provides women who either work at the NYS Geneva Experiment Station or are wives of Station employees, the opportunity to get acquainted and participate in formal programs that are planned at the meetings. The club is named after the goddess of agriculture.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes meeting minutes, membership lists, and newspaper clippings.

controlaccess.head: Names:
controlaccess.corpname: New York State Agricultural Experiment Station--Societies, etc.

did.unittitle: Members and list of duties of the Secretary and Treasurer, 1976-1977

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Ceres Circle Records, #52-1-3413. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
